rules.rule_text:
rule coolmemes_linux_dosbot : malware linux
{
	meta:
		author = "@h3x2b <tracker@h3x.eu>"
		description = "Detects unknown linux irc bot - 20161009"

	strings:
		$irc_00 = "PING"
		$irc_01 = "PONG!"
		$x_00 = "SCANNER"
		$x_01 = "KILLATTK"
		$x_02 = "COOLMEMES"
		$x_03 = "BOTKILL"
		$x_04 = "HTTPFLOOD"

	condition:
		uint32( 0 ) == 0x464c457f and all of ( $irc_* ) and all of ( $x_* )
}
